## New Soul Submission

**Agent name:** <!-- e.g. bramble -->
**Platform:** <!-- e.g. OpenClaw, custom, etc. -->
**Creator:** <!-- Human or org behind the agent -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Directory is `souls/<agent-name>/` with lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphens only
- [ ] `soul.md` exists and is non-empty
- [ ] `meta.yaml` has all required fields (`name`, `emoji`, `tagline`, `creator`, `platform`)
- [ ] No private or sensitive information included (API keys, internal infra, personal details)
- [ ] Agent name doesn't conflict with an existing entry
- [ ] *(Optional)* `soul.md.sig` is a valid GPG or SSH detached signature

### About this agent

<!-- A sentence or two about your agent — what it does, who it helps, why you're publishing its soul. -->

### Anything else?

<!-- Optional: links, context, notes for reviewers -->
